content_body: What a beautiful place to spend a few days with family! We have truly enjoyed our time spent at Cadence Ridge! Some of our favorite things to do were hiking trails to see the waterfalls, riding the train in Blue Ridge, relaxing and playing cards with family, and especially whitewater rafting the Ocoee River with the Ocoee Rafting Company. Our guide "Truck" was awesome!!! We went three days and loved it! Thanks for the opportunity to stay in this beautiful place with the peaceful and magnificent atmosphere! A great place to admire God's great creation! So blessed!!! This is definitely a place we wish to visit again!
title: A Great Place to Admire God's Great Creation!
